basic_details.job_title: Sports Authority of India Dean Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Sports Authority of India (SAI) has officially announced the Dean Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published at Sports Authority of India Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 64 years and hold a Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science along with required service experience can now submit their online applications up to 05 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science from a recognized University or Institution, 5 years regular service in Pay Level-12 or analogous post in scientific cadre
qualification.details: Dean: Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science from a recognized University or Institution. Officers who have worked under the Central Government/ State Government/ Union Territory Administrations in the scientific cadre holding Analogous post in the parent cadre/department or regular service of 5 years in the Pay Level-12 Rs.78800-209200 (PB-3, Rs.15600-39100+Rs.7600/- Grade Pay).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Sports Authority of India to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
